content:
100 XP
Reroll is permanent, but player loses access to items for two weeks.


✅ Why This Works:
• Encourages players to think carefully before using rerolls.
• Prevents “reroll spam” while keeping the option available.
• Scaling risk ensures late-game rerolls aren’t taken lightly.

📌 Final Lock-In Questions for Version 5.6

1. Should failed one-shot actions lock players out of participation for an extended period?

✔ Example: A failed sabotage bans them from rerolling for 2 weeks.

2. Should top XP earners be given a “Final Challenge” at the end of the semester?
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 208 (chunk 208/555)
